meta.title: Companies worth following
meta.note: Auto-tracked: the companies most active in the curated event log, each with its latest dated development. Machine-written from gated facts only; no hand-written copy.

companies.name: Grupo Carso
companies.signal: Carlos Slim's conglomerate expands into offshore oil exploration, adding private capital to a sector still dominated by Pemex.

companies.name: Pemex
companies.signal: The company said standard safety procedures contained the fire with no injuries reported, at a refinery central to the government's fuel self-sufficiency plans.

companies.name: Honda
companies.signal: Weak EV demand is prompting Honda to halt its electric model in Mexico, following a similar pullback by Toyota and raising questions about EV manufacturing plans in the country's auto export belt.

companies.name: CEMEX
companies.signal: The European Commission says CEMEX and other firms coordinated price increases in France, Germany, and Spain between 2021 and 2022, a case that could bring fines.

companies.name: BlackRock
companies.signal: BlackRock does not expect Mexico to lose its sovereign investment-grade rating, but flags the treaty's annual review mechanism as a recurring source of uncertainty for investors in the country.

companies.name: Apollo
companies.signal: The firm is in talks to fund infrastructure projects, particularly in energy and transport, pointing to continued foreign capital interest in Mexico despite trade tensions.
